{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Sentinel‑1 GRD σ⁰ (Sigma0) Terrain‑Corrected Workflow\n",
    "This notebook previews **Sigma0 terrain‑corrected** outputs generated by SNAP GPT.\n",
    "\n",
    "Files expected in:\n",
    "```\n",
    "../outputs/*.tif\n",
    "```"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "import rasterio\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "output_dir = Path(\"../outputs\")\n",
    "files = sorted(output_dir.glob(\"*_TC.tif\"))\n",
    "\n",
    "files"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": ["## Preview First Product"]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "if files:\n",
    "    f = files[0]\n",
    "    with rasterio.open(f) as src:\n",
    "        arr = src.read(1)\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
    "    plt.imshow(arr, cmap='gray')\n",
    "    plt.colorbar(label='Sigma0')\n",
    "    plt.title(f\"Sigma0 Preview: {f.name}\")\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print('No Sigma0 TC files found.')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": ["## Histogram"]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "if files:\n",
    "    f = files[0]\n",
    "    with rasterio.open(f) as src:\n",
    "        arr = src.read(1)\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(10,5))\n",
    "    plt.hist(arr.flatten(), bins=300, range=(np.percentile(arr,1), np.percentile(arr,99)))\n",
    "    plt.title(\"Sigma0 Histogram\")\n",
    "else:\n",
    "    print('No files.')"
   ]
  }
 ],
 "metadata": {
  "kernelspec": {"name": "python3", "language": "python", "display_name": "Python 3"},
  "language_info": {"name": "python", "version": "3.11"}
 },
 "nbformat": 4,
 "nbformat_minor": 5
}
